name: Monday.com
description: Monday.com is a work operating system that powers teams to run projects and workflows. Its GraphQL API lets you manage boards, items, columns, groups, and updates programmatically. All operations go through a single GraphQL endpoint.

capabilities.name: list_boards
capabilities.description: Retrieve all boards accessible to the authenticated user, with optional filtering and pagination.

capabilities.name: get_board
capabilities.description: Get detailed information about a specific board, including its columns, groups, and settings.

capabilities.name: list_items
capabilities.description: Retrieve items from a board or group with their column values and metadata.

capabilities.name: create_item
capabilities.description: Create a new item on a board, optionally in a specific group with column values.

capabilities.name: update_item
capabilities.description: Update column values on an existing item on a board.

capabilities.name: create_update
capabilities.description: Post a text update (comment) on an item for team communication.
